title: N@chushta' #5179
definition:
Nehushta = "brass"

 1) daughter of Elnathan, wife of king Jehoiakim of Judah and mother
    of king Jehoiachin of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nehushta = "brass"

 1) daughter of Elnathan, wife of king Jehoiakim of Judah and mother
    of king Jehoiachin of Judah

    NASB:  perh. lust, harlotry
